name: ARC Operator Stack
description: Umbrella Codex plugin bundle for Gary Doman's ARC stack: deterministic boot, receipts, branch-aware execution, Lucid Terminal routing, and LuciferAI_Local integration.

name: ARC Core
description: Kernel authority layer for receipts, event schema, state tree, branch engine, replay, rollback, and proof-backed execution.

name: Lucid Terminal
description: Deterministic operator interface for routing commands, visualizing runtime state, and enforcing authority-gated execution.

name: LuciferAI_Local
description: Local reasoning and proposal layer designed for offline workflows, controlled execution, and future ARC-integrated persistent agent loops.

name: Synth Shell
description: Visualization and embodiment layer for rendering ARC state, branches, and operator-facing system cognition surfaces.

name: ARC Turbo OS
description: Seed-rooted, branch-aware runtime concept focused on reusable computation graphs and jump-to-resolved-output execution.

name: Arc-RAR
description: Portable archive and transport layer concept for moving ARC-ready packages and runtime payloads across systems.

name: Proto-Synth Grid Engine
description: Virtual simulated physics capacity-weighted engine and wetware communications grid concept within the broader ARC ecosystem.

name: Seeded Universe Recreation Engine
description: Seed-based universe reconstruction project focused on deterministic physics, causal evolution, and replayable simulation states.
